body_html_quoted.html:
Hi Monica,

The countdown is on! 🎉 We can’t wait to see you Sunday May 17 for an incredible tasting experience. Get ready to enjoy a variety of delicious dishes, meet our team, and start bringing your event vision to life!

📍 Location: 199 Main St., Fitchburg, MA 01420
⏰ Arrival Time: 2:00 PM Please arrive 15 minutes earlier!

Come hungry and ready to enjoy! If you have any last-minute questions, feel free to reach out. We can’t wait to see you there! 😃🔥





-----
Regards,
Andre Raw
​​Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website

subject: Few Days Away! Your Tasting Event Details 🎉🍽️
body_text:
**Hi Monica,**

  

The countdown is on! 🎉 We can’t wait to see you **Sunday May 17** for an
incredible tasting experience. Get ready to enjoy a variety of delicious
dishes, meet our team, and start bringing your event vision to life!  
  

📍 **Location:** 199 Main St., Fitchburg, MA 01420  
⏰ **Arrival Time:** 2:00 PM **Please arrive 15 minutes earlier!**

  

Come hungry and ready to enjoy! If you have any last-minute questions, feel
free to reach out. We can’t wait to see you there! 😃🔥

![image.png](cid:348a-6832-f2eb)

  

  
  
  
  
\-----  
Regards,

**Andre Raw**  
 _​​_ Catering Event Coordinator

📲 C: [(978) 235-3791](tel:19782353791)

📲 W: [(978) 381-1212](tel:9783811212)  
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/comeketocatering) | [Instagram](https://instagram.com/comeketocatering) | [Website](https://comeketocatering.com/)
